{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Observations of the Unknown Wanderer
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Unknown Wanderer]] wrote a work titled '[[Observations of the Unknown Wanderer]]'.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
